title: Adryell
text_1: Hello! I'm Paulo Adryell, a backend developer focused on building robust and scalable systems that work reliably in production. My primary language is Python, but I also work with Java, TypeScript, and other backend technologies. I have experience designing APIs, modeling databases, integrating services, and handling the full lifecycle of a system, from architecture to deployment.
text_2: I started my journey in 2018 in a technical IT program integrated with high school, where I had my first contact with programming, databases, and operating systems. Since then, I've continuously evolved through both university studies and real-world projects, exploring concepts like object-oriented programming and software engineering best practices. Throughout my career, I've worked on projects such as course platforms, social networks, and financial systems, always focusing on performance, reliability, and simplicity. Outside of work, I enjoy studying technology, automating tasks, and watching anime.
